creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
El lunes 03 de diciembre a las 00:00:07 CET, Edwin Groothuis escribió:
> Maintainer of databases/sqldeveloper,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/174066 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174066

Patch applied with no problem, and the software works as expected.

Please commit with a minor tweak: in the pkg-message file you can see the link:

http://docs.oracle.com/cd/E25259_01/doc.31/e26419/install.htm#CIHIHDIF

After the update to new version, this link must be:

http://docs.oracle.com/cd/E35137_01/doc.32/e35119/install.htm#CIHDHHHJ

Best regards
